title: Greenbriar Dynasty
desc: The ancient royal bloodline of Elfhame, ruling from the Throne of Thorns. They govern the High Court with absolute majesty, pride, and a dangerous hunger for power.

title: Duarte & Madoc Household
desc: The home of General Madoc and the mortal twins Jude and Taryn. Representing raw redcap military force combined with mortal espionage, they sit at the heart of the realm's conspiracies.

title: Undersea Royal Family
desc: Queen Orlagh and Princess Nicasia rule the depths. Proud, ancient, and vast, they command the oceans surrounding Elfhame, using the tides and deep-sea leviathans to threaten the land.

title: Court of Termites
desc: Led by the pixie Lord Roiben and Kaye Fierch. A rogue court of wild pixie magic and shadow-dwellers. They remain loyal to the High Crown but fiercely autonomous.

title: Court of Teeth
desc: The frozen northern court led by Lady Nore and Princess Suren. Infamous for flesh-crafted relic magic, animal skins, and jagged teeth charms, they represent the ancient, cruel ways of Faerie.
